attributes.additional_details: High tuition fees create a barrier to education, forcing many talented students into debt or preventing them from attending university altogether. Lowering fees will ensure equal opportunities, promote social mobility, and empower young people to contribute to the economy and society without the burden of excessive financial stress. Affordable education benefits everyone by fostering a more skilled, innovative, and equitable workforce.
attributes.background: We urge the Government to lower university tuition fees, making higher education more accessible and affordable for all students, regardless of their financial background. This should include reducing current fees, capping future increases, and providing greater financial support for those in need.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Cap tuition fees at £9000 for all undergraduate degrees" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761951
